extension.description: Orion v3.5.0 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface for Movies, TV Shows, Kids Zone, and Trakt. NEW: Much BIGGER thumbnails throughout (56% larger main menu posters, 30% larger submenu posters, 25% larger grid cards). Netflix-style season selector and episode grid with BIG episode thumbnails (364x205px). Same UI for Kids Zone TV shows. Multiple torrent scrapers, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration, watch history, favorites, auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.5.0] NEW: Much BIGGER thumbnails throughout all views! Main menu posters now 204x284px (56% larger), submenu posters 240x320px (30% larger), grid cards 348x200px (25% larger). NEW: Netflix-style Season Selector dialog for TV shows. NEW: Episode Grid with BIG 364x205px thumbnails. Kids Zone TV shows now use same season/episode UI. Consistent cyan color theme throughout.
